backlinkResults.fullText:
Escalation raised by  Amy Vu
Description :    Can someone help me review Servicenow issues for FB?
they are having issues pulling incidents/problems/service requests which are not appearing searchable or providing any metrics. or returning partial data
document verification found:
https://fivebelow.service-now.com/incident?sys_id=d0c10a79931d32108dfcfda74dba1092
https://fivebelow.service-now.com/incident?sys_id=c8ba1be9932d3a50cfbbf10b6aba10da
document verification not found:
https://fivebelow.service-now.com/incident?sys_id=ffad4d1e93e1fe50cfbbf10b6aba10a5
"Expecting basic queries like number of incidents reported in a time bound or number of P1/P2 reported in a timebound are important for us as metric query. May be reporting is also a need for us. Please look into this asap and help us further."
they likely will want to hop on a call on this.
Investigation details : when i use docfinder, im unable to see any of the links be indexed?
asking them to downvote some searches for us to investigate further.
Customer
